    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="en">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
    <title>Sam Robinson M · Agribusiness Strategy & Analytics</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Libre+Baskerville:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,300;0,9..40,400;0,9..40,500;0,9..40,600;1,9..40,300&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
    <style>
    /* ─── RESET & BASE ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    :root {
    --ink: #0A0A0A;
    --ink-2: #2C2C2C;
    --ink-3: #5A5A5A;
    --ink-4: #8A8A8A;
    --rule: #E2E2E2;
    --rule-2: #F0F0F0;
    --bg: #FAFAF8;
    --white: #FFFFFF;
    --navy: #0C2340;
    --navy-lt: #1A3A5C;
    --accent: #0047AB;
    --accent-lt:#EEF3FC;
    --green: #006B4B;
    --green-lt: #EBF5F0;
    --amber: #92500A;
    --amber-lt: #FBF3E8;
    --f-display: 'Libre Baskerville', Georgia, serif;
    --f-body: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
    --r: 3px;
    --shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.06), 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
    --shadow-hover: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
    }
    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
    body {
    font-family: var(--f-body);
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    }
    /* ─── TYPOGRAPHY ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
    h1,h2,h3,h4 { font-family: var(--f-display); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; }
    h1 { font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 4rem); letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
    h2 { font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.2rem); letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
    h3 { font-size: 1.2rem; }
    h4 { font-family: var(--f-body); font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-4); }
    p { color: var(--ink-2); line-height: 1.75; }
    a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
    /* ─── LAYOUT ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .container { max-width: 1140px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 32px; }
    .container--narrow { max-width: 780px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 32px; }
    section { padding: 96px 0; }
    section + section { border-top: 1px solid var(--rule); }
    /* ─── NAV ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    background: rgba(250,250,248,0.92);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
    }
    .nav-inner {
    max-width: 1140px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 32px;
    height: 60px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    }
    .nav-logo {
    font-family: var(--f-display); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy);
    }
    .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 36px; }
    .nav-links a {
    font-size: 0.83rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--ink-3);
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
    transition: color 0.2s;
    }
    .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--ink); }
    .nav-cta {
    background: var(--navy);
    color: var(--white) !important;
    padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: var(--r);
    font-size: 0.8rem !important; font-weight: 600 !important;
    transition: background 0.2s !important;
    }
    .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--navy-lt) !important; }
    /* ─── HERO ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #hero {
    padding: 160px 0 96px;
    border-top: none;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    }
    #hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; top: 0; right: -200px;
    width: 700px; height: 700px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,71,171,0.05) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
    }
    .hero-eyebrow {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    background: var(--accent-lt); border: 1px solid rgba(0,71,171,0.15);
    border-radius: 100px; padding: 6px 14px;
    font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent);
    letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    }
    .hero-eyebrow::before {
    content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--accent);
    }
    #hero h1 {
    max-width: 800px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
    }
    #hero h1 em {
    font-style: italic; color: var(--accent);
    }
    .hero-sub {
    font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--ink-3); max-width: 580px;
    margin-bottom: 48px; line-height: 1.7;
    }
    .hero-stats {
    display: flex; gap: 48px; flex-wrap: wrap;
    padding: 32px 0;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--rule);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
    margin-bottom: 40px;
    }
    .stat-item { }
    .stat-value {
    font-family: var(--f-display); font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--navy); line-height: 1;
    }
    .stat-label { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--ink-4); margin-top: 4px; font-weight: 500; }
    .hero-actions { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .btn {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: var(--r);
    font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s; border: none;
    font-family: var(--f-body);
    }
    .btn-primary {
    background: var(--navy); color: var(--white);
    }
    .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--navy-lt); transform: translateY(-1px); }
    .btn-secondary {
    background: transparent; color: var(--ink);
    border: 1.5px solid var(--rule);
    }
    .btn-secondary:hover { border-color: var(--ink-3); transform: translateY(-1px); }
    /* ─── SECTION HEADERS ──────────────────────────────────────── */
    .sec-header { margin-bottom: 56px; }
    .sec-header h4 { margin-bottom: 12px; }
    .sec-header h2 { margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .sec-header p { color: var(--ink-3); font-size: 1.05rem; max-width: 560px; }
    /* ─── ABOUT ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #about { background: var(--white); }
    .about-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
    gap: 56px; align-items: start;
    }
    .about-text p { margin-bottom: 20px; font-size: 1.02rem; }
    .about-text p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
    .about-credentials { }
    .credential-item {
    display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: flex-start;
    padding: 20px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule-2);
    }
    .credential-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid var(--rule-2); }
    .cred-icon {
    width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: var(--r);
    background: var(--accent-lt); flex-shrink: 0;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1rem;
    }
    .cred-body { }
    .cred-title { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--ink); margin-bottom: 2px; }
    .cred-meta { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--ink-4); }
    /* ─── CASE STUDIES ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #work { }
    .case-grid {
    display: grid; gap: 28px;
    }
    .case-card {
    background: var(--white);
    border: 1px solid var(--rule);
    border-radius: 6px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    transition: box-shadow 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
    }
    .case-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-hover); transform: translateY(-2px); }
    /* ── NEW: Key Takeaway Banner ── */
    .case-takeaway {
    background: var(--navy);
    padding: 14px 36px;
    display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px;
    }
    .case-takeaway .kt-label {
    font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
    white-space: nowrap; padding-top: 2px; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .case-takeaway .kt-text {
    font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92);
    font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.55;
    }
    .case-takeaway .kt-text strong { color: #7EC8F0; font-weight: 700; }
    .case-header {
    padding: 32px 36px 28px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule-2);
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 24px;
    }
    .case-meta { flex: 1; }
    .case-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    }
    .tag-strategy { background: var(--accent-lt); color: var(--accent); }
    .tag-supplychain{ background: var(--green-lt); color: var(--green); }
    .tag-research { background: var(--amber-lt); color: var(--amber); }
    .case-header h3 {
    font-size: 1.35rem; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .case-header .case-brief {
    font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--ink-3); line-height: 1.65;
    }
    .case-badge {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    text-align: right;
    }
    .case-badge .impact-val {
    font-family: var(--f-display); font-size: 1.8rem; color: var(--navy);
    font-weight: 700; line-height: 1;
    }
    .case-badge .impact-label {
    font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--ink-4); font-weight: 500; margin-top: 4px;
    }
    .case-body {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--rule-2);
    }
    .case-pillar {
    padding: 28px 28px 28px 28px;
    border-right: 1px solid var(--rule-2);
    }
    .case-pillar:last-child { border-right: none; }
    .pillar-label {
    font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.14em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-4);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
    }
    .pillar-label::before {
    content: ''; width: 16px; height: 1.5px;
    background: var(--ink-4); flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .pillar-content { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--ink-2); line-height: 1.65; }
    .pillar-content ul { padding-left: 0; list-style: none; }
    .pillar-content li {
    padding: 4px 0 4px 14px; position: relative;
    font-size: 0.84rem;
    }
    .pillar-content li::before {
    content: '→'; position: absolute; left: 0;
    color: var(--accent); font-size: 0.75rem; top: 5px;
    }
    /* ── NEW: Insight Highlight Boxes ── */
    .insight-metrics {
    display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 14px;
    }
    .insight-chip {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    background: var(--rule-2); border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 8px 12px; flex: 1; min-width: 70px;
    }
    .insight-chip .ic-val {
    font-family: var(--f-display); font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1; color: var(--navy);
    }
    .insight-chip .ic-label {
    font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--ink-4); margin-top: 3px; font-weight: 500;
    }
    .insight-chip.accent { background: var(--accent-lt); }
    .insight-chip.accent .ic-val { color: var(--accent); }
    .insight-chip.green { background: var(--green-lt); }
    .insight-chip.green .ic-val { color: var(--green); }
    .insight-chip.amber { background: var(--amber-lt); }
    .insight-chip.amber .ic-val { color: var(--amber); }
    /* ── NEW: SVG Mini Charts ── */
    .mini-chart-wrap {
    margin-top: 16px;
    background: var(--rule-2);
    border-radius: 4px;
    padding: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    }
    .mini-chart-wrap .chart-title {
    font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-4); margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .mini-chart-wrap svg { display: block; width: 100%; overflow: visible; }
    /* ── NEW: Why This Matters strip ── */
    .case-why {
    padding: 18px 36px;
    background: #F7F9FD;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--rule-2);
    display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start;
    }
    .why-icon {
    font-size: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px;
    }
    .why-body { }
    .why-label {
    font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.14em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 4px;
    }
    .why-text {
    font-size: 0.84rem; color: var(--ink-2); line-height: 1.6;
    }
    .why-text strong { color: var(--ink); }
    .case-footer {
    padding: 20px 36px;
    background: var(--rule-2);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
    font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--ink-3);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--rule);
    }
    .case-footer strong { color: var(--ink); font-weight: 600; }
    /* ── NEW: Inline bar chart for contract farming ── */
    .bar-chart-inline { margin-top: 14px; }
    .bar-row {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .bar-row-label { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--ink-3); width: 80px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .bar-track {
    flex: 1; height: 8px; border-radius: 100px;
    background: var(--rule); overflow: hidden;
    }
    .bar-fill {
    height: 100%; border-radius: 100px;
    transition: width 1s ease;
    }
    .bar-fill.contract { background: var(--green); }
    .bar-fill.noncontract { background: var(--rule); border: 1px solid #C8D0D8; }
    .bar-val { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ink-3); width: 36px; }
    /* ─── SKILLS ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #skills { background: var(--navy); color: var(--white); }
    #skills h4 { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); }
    #skills h2 { color: var(--white); }
    #skills .sec-header p { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); }
    .skills-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 2px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .skill-block {
    background: var(--navy);
    padding: 36px 32px;
    transition: background 0.2s;
    }
    .skill-block:hover { background: var(--navy-lt); }
    .skill-icon {
    font-size: 1.4rem; margin-bottom: 16px; display: block;
    }
    .skill-block h3 {
    font-family: var(--f-body); font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .skill-block p { font-size: 0.83rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); line-height: 1.6; }
    .tools-row {
    margin-top: 48px; padding-top: 40px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .tools-label { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.14em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); margin-right: 8px; }
    .tool-chip {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    border-radius: 100px;
    padding: 6px 16px; font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); font-weight: 500;
    }
    /* ─── PUBLICATIONS ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #publications { background: var(--white); }
    .pub-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 24px; }
    .pub-card {
    border: 1px solid var(--rule);
    border-radius: 6px; padding: 28px 32px;
    background: var(--white);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    transition: box-shadow 0.3s;
    position: relative;
    }
    .pub-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-hover); }
    .pub-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 3px; border-radius: 6px 6px 0 0;
    }
    .pub-published::before { background: var(--accent); }
    .pub-review::before { background: var(--amber); }
    .pub-status {
    font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 14px;
    }
    .pub-published .pub-status { color: var(--accent); }
    .pub-review .pub-status { color: var(--amber); }
    .pub-card h3 {
    font-size: 1.05rem; margin-bottom: 10px; color: var(--navy); line-height: 1.4;
    }
    .pub-card .pub-journal { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--ink-4); margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .pub-methods {
    display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px;
    }
    .method-tag {
    background: var(--rule-2); border-radius: 2px;
    padding: 3px 8px; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--ink-3); font-weight: 500;
    }
    /* ─── CONTACT ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #contact { background: var(--bg); }
    .contact-inner {
    max-width: 680px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center;
    }
    .contact-inner h2 { margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .contact-inner p { color: var(--ink-3); margin-bottom: 40px; font-size: 1.05rem; }
    .contact-links {
    display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .contact-link {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: var(--r);
    font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--rule);
    background: var(--white);
    color: var(--ink);
    transition: all 0.2s;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    }
    .contact-link:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); transform: translateY(-1px); }
    .contact-link .link-icon { font-size: 1.1rem; }
    /* ─── FOOTER ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    footer {
    border-top: 1px solid var(--rule);
    padding: 28px 32px;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px;
    max-width: 1140px; margin: 0 auto;
    }
    footer p { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--ink-4); }
    footer .f-right { text-align: right; }
    footer a { color: var(--accent); }
    /* ─── ANIMATIONS ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
    @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }
    .fade-up { animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease both; }
    .fade-up:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
    .fade-up:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
    .fade-up:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
    .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease; }
    .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    /* ─── RESPONSIVE ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
    @media (max-width: 960px) {
    .case-body { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .case-pillar { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule-2); }
    .case-pillar:nth-child(even) { border-right: none; }
    .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .about-photo-wrap { order: -1; }
    .pub-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .skills-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 680px) {
    .container, .container--narrow { padding: 0 20px; }
    section { padding: 64px 0; }
    #hero { padding: 120px 0 64px; }
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .hero-stats { gap: 28px; }
    .case-body { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .case-pillar { border-right: none; }
    .case-header { flex-direction: column; }
    .skills-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    #hero h1 { font-size: 2.1rem; }
    .case-takeaway { padding: 14px 20px; }
    .case-why { padding: 16px 20px; }
    .case-footer { padding: 16px 20px; }
    }
    /* ─── SCROLLBAR ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 5px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--rule-2); }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--rule); border-radius: 3px; }
    ::selection { background: var(--accent); color: var(--white); }
    /* ─── PROFILE PHOTO ────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .about-photo-wrap {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: flex-start;
    padding-top: 8px;
    }
    .about-photo {
    width: 200px;
    height: 200px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center top;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.12), 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    border: 3px solid var(--white);
    outline: 1px solid var(--rule);
    display: block;
    }
    @media (max-width: 960px) {
    .about-photo-wrap { padding-top: 0; justify-content: flex-start; }
    .about-photo { width: 160px; height: 160px; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 680px) {
    .about-photo { width: 130px; height: 130px; }
    }
    /* ─── ITC CASE STUDY GRID (mobile) ──────────────────────────── */
    @media (max-width: 960px) {
    .itc-case-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr !important; }
    }
    @media (max-width: 680px) {
    .itc-case-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
    }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════ NAV -->
    <nav>
    <div class="nav-inner">
    <div class="nav-logo">Sam Robinson M</div>
    <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#about">About</a>
    <a href="#itc-case">ITC Case</a>
    <a href="#work">Case Studies</a>
    <a href="#skills">Skills</a>
    <a href="#publications">Research</a>
    <a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Contact</a>
    </div>
    </div>
    </nav>
    <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════ HERO -->
    <section id="hero">
    <div class="container">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow fade-up">MBA · Agribusiness Strategy &amp; Analytics</div>
    <h1 class="fade-up">Solving Agri-Business Problems<br/>using <em>Data, Strategy,</em><br/>and Field Execution</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub fade-up">
    MBA graduate with hands-on experience executing procurement operations covering 130 MT (₹76 lakh) at ITC Limited, combined with research-driven analytics across 30+ years of agri-trade data to solve complex market and supply chain problems.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-stats fade-up">
    <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-value">130 MT</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Procurement Handled · ITC Ltd</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-value">30 Yrs</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Export Data Analysed</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-value">2×</div>
    <div class="stat-label">ICAR Publications</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-item">
    <div class="stat-value">85.2%</div>
    <div class="stat-label">MBA Score · TNAU</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-actions fade-up">
    <a href="#work" class="btn btn-primary">View Case Studies ↓</a>
    <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-secondary">Get in Touch</a>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════ ABOUT -->
    <section id="about">
    <div class="container">
    <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-text reveal">
    <h4>About</h4>
    <h2 style="margin-bottom:24px;">Research-backed.<br/>Field-tested.</h2>
    <p>
    I am an MBA (Agribusiness Management) graduate from Tamil Nadu Agricultural University
    with a distinctive profile that bridges quantitative research and live market execution.
    My work sits at the intersection of <strong>strategy, data science, and supply chain operations</strong> —
    the exact blend that drives consulting impact.
    </p>
    <h3 style="font-size:1.05rem; color:var(--navy); margin-bottom:14px; font-family:var(--f-display);">ITC Limited – Procurement Optimization in Chilli Supply Chain</h3>
    <p>
    During my internship with ITC's Agri Business Division (Spices), I was responsible for executing end-to-end procurement operations across key chilli-growing clusters in Vilathikulam and Pudur, Thoothukudi district.
    </p>
    <p>
    I executed and managed procurement of ~130 MT of dry chilli (including ~100 MT of Gundu/white chilli variants and ~30 MT of Samba chilli) from a sampled pool of ~130 MT, translating to a total procurement value of ~₹76 lakh. The sourcing process involved field-level engagement with farmers, quality sampling, lab-based validation (Guntur), and final lot selection aligned with export-grade standards.
    </p>
    <p>
    A key operational challenge was high rejection rates due to stringent quality benchmarks, coupled with price volatility driven by Guntur market trends and fragmented farmer networks. To address this, I coordinated closely with local intermediaries (wholesale aggregators) to streamline sourcing and improve lot accessibility. Additionally, I optimized sample logistics by shifting from conventional transport to faster, cost-efficient bus-based dispatch, reducing turnaround time for quality validation and accelerating procurement cycles.
    </p>
    <p>
    Operating under a market-linked procurement strategy, I ensured alignment with prevailing price benchmarks while maintaining strict quality compliance. Through structured sampling, Excel-based tracking of lots and quantities, and on-ground coordination, I successfully delivered procurement within ~40 days, improving procurement cycle efficiency by an estimated ~25–30% compared to traditional sampling and logistics timelines, while ensuring timely aggregation of high-quality produce for downstream processing.
    </p>
    <p>
    This experience strengthened my ability to manage complex agri-supply chains, balance quality vs. speed trade-offs, and execute large-scale procurement under uncertain market conditions, contributing to more efficient and reliable sourcing operations.
    </p>
    <p>
    I structure ambiguous problems, synthesise large datasets into clear recommendations,
    and communicate findings to stakeholders — the core of consulting work.
    </p>
    </div>
    <div class="about-photo-wrap reveal">
    <img

    alt="Sam Robinson M"
    class="about-photo"
    />
    </div>
    <div class="about-credentials reveal">
    <div class="credential-item">
    <div class="cred-icon">🎓</div>
    <div class="cred-body">
    <div class="cred-title">MBA — Agribusiness Management · 86%</div>
    <div class="cred-meta">Tamil Nadu Agricultural University · 2023–2025 · Bengaluru</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="credential-item">
    <div class="cred-icon">🎓</div>
    <div class="cred-body">
    <div class="cred-title">B.Sc. (Hons) Agriculture · 77.5%</div>
    <div class="cred-meta">Tamil Nadu Agricultural University · 2018–2022</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="credential-item">
    <div class="cred-icon">🏭</div>
    <div class="cred-body">
    <div class="cred-title">Procurement Intern — ITC Limited, Guntur</div>
    <div class="cred-meta">Mar–May 2025 · ~130 MT procurement · 12 centres · 50+ farmers</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="credential-item">
    <div class="cred-icon">📄</div>
    <div class="cred-body">
    <div class="cred-title">Published · Indian Journal of Animal Sciences (ICAR)</div>
    <div class="cred-meta">Buffalo Meat Export Analysis · Vol 95(5) · May 2025</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="credential-item">
    <div class="cred-icon">📄</div>
    <div class="cred-body">
    <div class="cred-title">Under Review · Dry Chilli Price Forecasting (ARIMA)</div>
    <div class="cred-meta">Ramanathapuram Market · 20-year data · TNAU 2025</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="credential-item">
    <div class="cred-icon">🌿</div>
    <div class="cred-body">
    <div class="cred-title">Field Research — MYRADA NGO, Krishnagiri</div>
    <div class="cred-meta">50+ tribal community members · PRA methodology · 2022</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════ ITC CASE STUDY -->
    <section id="itc-case" style="background: var(--white);">
    <div class="container">
    <div class="sec-header reveal">
    <h4>Case Study</h4>
    <h2>ITC Limited — Procurement Optimization<br/>in Chilli Supply Chain</h2>
    <p>A structured breakdown of the procurement challenge, analytical approach, and operational outcomes from my Agri Business Division internship.</p>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap:24px;" class="itc-case-grid reveal">
    <!-- PROBLEM -->
    <div style="background:var(--bg); border:1px solid var(--rule); border-radius:6px; padding:28px 26px; box-shadow:var(--shadow); border-top:3px solid #C0392B;">
    <div style="font-size:1.5rem; margin-bottom:12px;">⚠️</div>
    <h3 style="font-family:var(--f-body); font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:#C0392B; margin-bottom:16px;">Problem</h3>
    <ul style="list-style:none; padding:0; margin:0;">
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65; border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:#C0392B;font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>High rejection rates due to strict export-quality standards</li>
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65; border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:#C0392B;font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Price volatility driven by Guntur market fluctuations</li>
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65; border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:#C0392B;font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Fragmented farmer base leading to sourcing inefficiencies</li>
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:#C0392B;font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Delays in quality validation due to slow sample logistics</li>
    </ul>
    </div>
    <!-- APPROACH -->
    <div style="background:var(--bg); border:1px solid var(--rule); border-radius:6px; padding:28px 26px; box-shadow:var(--shadow); border-top:3px solid var(--accent);">
    <div style="font-size:1.5rem; margin-bottom:12px;">⚙️</div>
    <h3 style="font-family:var(--f-body); font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:var(--accent); margin-bottom:16px;">Approach</h3>
    <ul style="list-style:none; padding:0; margin:0;">
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65; border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--accent);font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Executed procurement of ~130 MT (100 MT Gundu + 30 MT Samba) worth ₹76 lakh</li>
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65; border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--accent);font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Conducted field-level sourcing, farmer visits, and quality sampling</li>
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65; border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--accent);font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Implemented lab-based validation (Guntur) and export-grade lot selection</li>
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65; border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--accent);font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Coordinated with wholesale aggregators to improve lot accessibility</li>
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65; border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--accent);font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Optimized logistics via bus-based sample dispatch (faster, lower cost)</li>
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65; border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--accent);font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Used Excel for structured lot tracking and quantity coordination</li>
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--accent);font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Applied market-linked procurement strategy aligned to Guntur price benchmarks</li>
    </ul>
    </div>
    <!-- IMPACT -->
    <div style="background:var(--bg); border:1px solid var(--rule); border-radius:6px; padding:28px 26px; box-shadow:var(--shadow); border-top:3px solid var(--green);">
    <div style="font-size:1.5rem; margin-bottom:12px;">📈</div>
    <h3 style="font-family:var(--f-body); font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:var(--green); margin-bottom:16px;">Impact</h3>
    <ul style="list-style:none; padding:0; margin:0;">
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65; border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--green);font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Delivered full procurement cycle within ~40 days</li>
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65; border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--green);font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Reduced quality validation turnaround time via logistics optimization</li>
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65; border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--green);font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Improved sourcing efficiency through aggregator coordination</li>
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65; border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule-2);"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--green);font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Ensured export-grade quality consistency across all lots</li>
    <li style="padding:6px 0 6px 16px; position:relative; font-size:0.875rem; color:var(--ink-2); line-height:1.65;"><span style="position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--green);font-size:0.75rem;top:8px;">→</span>Enabled smoother, reliable supply flow for downstream processing</li>
    </ul>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════ CASE STUDIES -->
    <section id="work">
    <div class="container">
    <div class="sec-header reveal">
    <h4>Case Studies</h4>
    <h2>Structured problem solving<br/>across India's agri-trade sector</h2>
    <p>Each study follows a clear analytical approach: define the problem, build the evidence base, surface the insight, recommend the action.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="case-grid">
    <!-- ════════════════════════════════════ CASE 1: DRY CHILLI -->
    <div class="case-card reveal">
    <!-- KEY TAKEAWAY -->
    <div class="case-takeaway">
    <span class="kt-label">Key Takeaway</span>
    <span class="kt-text">Dry chilli prices rise <strong>~25% between January and December</strong> in a predictable seasonal pattern — suggesting that procurement timing, guided by data, can meaningfully reduce margin risk for buyers without changing a single supplier relationship.</span>
    </div>
    <div class="case-header">
    <div class="case-meta">
    <span class="case-tag tag-strategy">Price Analytics</span>
    <h3>Dry Chilli Price Forecasting &amp; Procurement Optimisation</h3>
    <p class="case-brief">
    Unpredictable price swings in India's dry chilli market expose commodity buyers to margin risk and force farmers into distress sales.
    A 20-year analysis of price behaviour revealed a consistent seasonal pattern — enabling buyers to time procurement and lock in cost advantages before peak season.
    </p>
    </div>
    <div class="case-badge">
    <div class="impact-val">20 Yrs</div>
    <div class="impact-label">Price Data Modelled</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="case-body">
    <div class="case-pillar">
    <div class="pillar-label">Problem</div>
    <div class="pillar-content">
    <p>Buyers overpay when purchasing at price peaks; farmers undersell during glut periods. Tamil Nadu's price instability is <strong>5× the national average</strong> — making the market structurally difficult to navigate without data.</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="case-pillar">
    <div class="pillar-label">Approach</div>
    <div class="pillar-content">
    <ul>
    <li>20 years of AGMARKNET market price data (2004–2024)</li>
    <li>Instability benchmarking: Tamil Nadu vs national</li>
    <li>Seasonal price index built month-by-month</li>
    <li>Forecasted price trajectory through 2025 using best-fit time-series model</li>
    </ul>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="case-pillar">
    <div class="pillar-label">Key Insights</div>
    <div class="pillar-content">
    <ul>
    <li>Prices peak every December — pre-harvest tightness is structural, not random</li>
    <li>Jan–Mar is the optimal procurement window (lowest seasonal index)</li>
    <li>Prices forecast to rise through late 2025</li>
    <li>TN instability 5× national — requires localised risk management</li>
    </ul>
    <!-- INSIGHT METRICS -->
    <div class="insight-metrics">
    <div class="insight-chip accent">
    <span class="ic-val">5×</span>
    <span class="ic-label">TN vs national instability</span>
    </div>
    <div class="insight-chip green">
    <span class="ic-val">Jan–Mar</span>
    <span class="ic-label">Optimal buy window</span>
    </div>
    <div class="insight-chip amber">
    <span class="ic-val">Dec↑</span>
    <span class="ic-label">Annual price peak</span>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- SVG SEASONAL PRICE CHART -->
    <div class="mini-chart-wrap" style="margin-top:14px;">
    <div class="chart-title">Seasonal Price Index · Jan–Dec (Base = 100)</div>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 280 72" height="72">
    <defs>
    <linearGradient id="g1" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0047AB" stop-opacity="0.18"/>
    <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0047AB" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    </defs>
    <!-- grid lines -->
    <line x1="0" y1="36" x2="280" y2="36" stroke="#E2E2E2" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,3"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="60" x2="280" y2="60" stroke="#E2E2E2" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,3"/>
    <!-- area fill: seasonal index values mapped: 88-116 → y 60-6 -->
    <!-- months: 92,88,85,89,93,96,98,100,103,106,110,116 -->
    <!-- formula: y = 60 - (val-85)/(116-85)*54 -->
    <polygon
    points="0,46 23,50 46,54 69,49 92,44 115,40 138,37 161,34 184,28 207,23 230,13 253,0 253,60 0,60"
    fill="url(#g1)"/>
    <polyline
    points="0,46 23,50 46,54 69,49 92,44 115,40 138,37 161,34 184,28 207,23 230,13 253,0"
    fill="none" stroke="#0047AB" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- dots -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="46" r="2.5" fill="#0047AB"/>
    <circle cx="23" cy="50" r="2.5" fill="#0047AB"/>
    <circle cx="46" cy="54" r="3" fill="#EF4444"/>
    <circle cx="69" cy="49" r="2.5" fill="#0047AB"/>
    <circle cx="253" cy="0" r="3" fill="#EF4444"/>
    <!-- labels -->
    <text x="2" y="70" font-size="7" fill="#8A8A8A" font-family="sans-serif">Jan</text>
    <text x="42" y="70" font-size="7" fill="#8A8A8A" font-family="sans-serif">Mar</text>
    <text x="108" y="70" font-size="7" fill="#8A8A8A" font-family="sans-serif">Jun</text>
    <text x="175" y="70" font-size="7" fill="#8A8A8A" font-family="sans-serif">Sep</text>
    <text x="236" y="70" font-size="7" fill="#8A8A8A" font-family="sans-serif">Dec</text>
    <text x="246" y="8" font-size="7" fill="#EF4444" font-family="sans-serif" font-weight="700">Peak</text>
    <text x="38" y="62" font-size="7" fill="#006B4B" font-family="sans-serif" font-weight="700">Buy↓</text>
    </svg>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="case-pillar">
    <div class="pillar-label">Recommendations</div>
    <div class="pillar-content">
    <ul>
    <li><strong>Buy Jan–Mar</strong> — prices are at seasonal floor, 15–20% below December peak</li>
    <li>Build cold-chain buffer stock for Oct–Dec release to capture price upside</li>
    <li>Set price-trigger contracts with farmers to lock in floor prices</li>
    <li>Insights aligned with procurement practices observed during internship at ITC Guntur — an early-sampling protocol was in place that significantly reduced post-acceptance rejections during the implementation phase</li>
    </ul>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- WHY THIS MATTERS -->
    <div class="case-why">
    <span class="why-icon">💡</span>
    <div class="why-body">
    <div class="why-label">Why This Matters</div>
    <div class="why-text">
    India processes over <strong>1.9 million tonnes</strong> of dry chilli annually. A procurement timing shift of just 2–3 months — guided by seasonal price intelligence — has the potential to meaningfully reduce input costs for buyers. <strong>This kind of data-driven procurement planning</strong> is directly replicable across seasonal commodity desks in India's agri-FMCG sector.
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="case-footer">
    <strong>Business Impact:</strong>
    &nbsp;Seasonal price insights relevant to procurement timing at ITC · Early-sampling protocol contributed to reducing rejection rates · Price forecast under journal review (2025)
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- ════════════════════════════════════ CASE 2: CONTRACT FARMING -->
    <div class="case-card reveal">
    <!-- KEY TAKEAWAY -->
    <div class="case-takeaway">
    <span class="kt-label">Key Takeaway</span>
    <span class="kt-text">Contract farming delivers a <strong>~30% income premium</strong> for smallholder farmers — but only when structured with a floor-price guarantee plus spot-market upside. Risk perception, not economics, is the primary barrier to scale.</span>
    </div>
    <div class="case-header">
    <div class="case-meta">
    <span class="case-tag tag-supplychain">Value Chain Strategy</span>
    <h3>Contract vs. Non-Contract Farming: Income Impact &amp; Scalability</h3>
    <p class="case-brief">
    Farmer income instability creates procurement risk for buyers and poverty traps for producers.
    A 120-farmer comparative study quantified the income gap between contracted and uncontracted farmers
    and identified the design features of a scalable contract model.
    </p>
    </div>
    <div class="case-badge">
    <div class="impact-val">+30%</div>
    <div class="impact-label">Income Premium Identified</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="case-body">
    <div class="case-pillar">
    <div class="pillar-label">Problem</div>
    <div class="pillar-content">
    <p>Smallholder farmers outside formal contracts face price uncertainty, input access gaps, and lower yields — creating a structural income disadvantage that feeds both farmer distress and supply volatility for commodity buyers.</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="case-pillar">
    <div class="pillar-label">Approach</div>
    <div class="pillar-content">
    <ul>
    <li>Primary survey of 120 farmers (contract vs non-contract groups)</li>
    <li>Propensity Score Matching to eliminate selection bias</li>
    View remainder of file in raw view
